abilities.name: Plasma Field
abilities.description: Releases a plasma wave that grows in power as it expands, but also zaps on contraction, slowing and dealing damage to enemy units caught in its path.Each enemy unit can be hit twice, once each upon expanding and contracting. The further the distance, the stronger the effect.

abilities.name: Static Link
abilities.description: Creates a charged link between Razor and an enemy unit, the enemy unit loses attack damage incrementally while being linked to Razor.

abilities.name: Storm Surge
abilities.description: When attacked by an enemy, Razor has a chance to release a Forked Lightning that strikes the attacking source, prioritizing the attacker's unit-type.

abilities.name: Eye of the Storm
abilities.description: A powerful lightning storm strikes out at enemy units with the lowest health, dealing damage and reducing their armor.

talents.left: -0.1s Eye of the Storm Strike Interval
talents.right: x1.35 Storm Surge Damage/Move Speed Slow
